title: 2D Array assignment in port does not work

features.name: unpacked array element connected to module output port
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an element of an unpacked array is used as the connection for an output port, so the driven value is expected to propagate back into that array element

features.name: packed logic element within single-element unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a declaration of a single-element unpacked array whose element type is a packed logic vector, and then read one element via an index in a continuous assignment

features.name: module output port driving an unpacked array element vs packed slice equivalence
features.description: Code should include two semantically equivalent ways to connect a submodule output: one using a packed bit-slice of a plain logic vector and one using an indexed element of an unpacked array, verifying both produce the same result
